faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Maplewood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Maplewood, NJ. Emergency situations involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas receive priority scheduling. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest elimination using professional-grade treatments, safe nest removal when accessible, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility (ground level vs. high elevation), and the number of nests present on your Maplewood property.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Maplewood, NJ?
faqs.answer: Yes, Maplewood's mature trees, older homes with attic spaces, and proximity to South Mountain Reservation create favorable conditions for bald-faced hornets and European hornets. Activity peaks from late summer through early fall when colonies reach maximum size. We serve properties throughout Maplewood including areas near Wyoming Avenue, Valley Street, and the Hilton neighborhood.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use targeted treatment methods and safety protocols to eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to your household. We establish safety perimeters during treatment and provide clear instructions for re-entry. All products used are EPA-approved and applied according to strict safety standards suitable for residential properties.
